title: BARC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 56 Research Associate Posts
description: The Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 56 Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electronics Engineering, Ph.D., can apply for the BARC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details....
